case_title: CACH, LLC VS. TING L. HUNG et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC SERVED SEP-03-2010, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT HUNG, TING L.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUNG, TING L. $3,699.28 PRINCIPAL, $690.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $535.13 INTEREST, $260.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,184.41, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
